description_long: This object is a modern flat-screen television with a wide, rectangular display and a thin, black bezel surrounding the screen. The front surface is dominated by the large, flat display area, which appears to be off or showing static. The television is supported by a sturdy, rectangular base that is metallic in appearance, providing stability. The side views reveal the ultra-slim profile of the screen, characteristic of contemporary LED or LCD televisions. The back of the television is solid and dark, likely housing the internal electronics and connection ports, though no ports are visible in the images. The overall design is minimalist and sleek, suitable for both residential and commercial urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern flat-screen television with a thin black bezel and a metallic base, featuring a large rectangular display and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, flat display with a thin black bezel and a metallic base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ultra-slim profile of the television and the depth of the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, dark back panel and the full width of the metallic base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizing the thinness of the screen and the base's extension.
attribute_bezel_design: thin black plastic bezel, rectangular, minimalistic styling
